brand.name: Psychic Wayne
brand.tagline: Professional Astrology & Tarot Reader in Southern California

offer.what: Phone/online tarot card readings (10, 15, 20, 30, 60 min sessions), natal-chart astrology reports, numerology reports, compatibility reports, transit reports, daily horoscopes, and tarot products (planners, e-books)
offer.coreOutcome: Clarity and confident direction on love, career, and life decisions
offer.pricePoint: Session-based one-off bookings; exact prices not publicly listed — typical market range $25–$150+ per session by length
offer.commitment: No mandatory recurring commitment; clients rebook at will
leadMagnets: VIP SMS list — text FUTURE to 818-600-9195 for discounts, exclusive offers, and horoscopes
Email opt-in for astro updates and savings
Free daily horoscopes by zodiac sign published on-site

audience.icp: Women 25–55 in the US who follow astrology content on social media and seek spiritual clarity on love, relationships, and major life decisions; open-minded and spiritually curious
painPoints: Uncertainty about romantic relationships or whether to stay or leave
Career crossroads with no clear answer
Feeling stuck, lost, or without direction
Need for personalized insight beyond generic horoscopes
Desire for validation or reassurance from a trusted, credible source
segments: First-time seekers — curious but skeptical, drawn in by the free 20-min reading
Returning clients — believers who want periodic life-update check-ins
Astrology/tarot enthusiasts — consume daily horoscope content, open to paid reports
Gift buyers — purchasing readings as gifts for friends or family

salesCycle.length: Same day to a few days — spiritual-service decisions are emotionally driven and convert quickly
salesCycle.trial: Free 20-minute tarot reading page; VIP SMS list with discount codes
salesCycle.closeMechanism: Self-serve online booking via Acuity Scheduling (psychicwayne1.as.me) or direct phone call (1-888-929-6307); Etsy shop for digital products
salesCycle.topObjection: Skepticism about accuracy and legitimacy ('Is this real / will it actually help me?'); price sensitivity for longer sessions

ahaMoment: The first live reading where Wayne names something specific and accurate that the client hasn't shared — that resonance moment shifts a curious visitor into a true believer and repeat customer

retention.recurring: Repeat bookings on a self-selected cadence (no formal subscription); clients return for major decisions, seasonal check-ins, or when life feels uncertain again
retention.expansion: Upgrading session length (10 min → 30/60 min); adding astrology, numerology, or compatibility reports to a base reading
retention.churnRisk: One-and-done visitors who never rebook after an initial reading; VIP text/email subscribers who go cold; crisis bookers who disengage once their immediate question resolves

lifecycleGaps: Welcome & onboarding — no confirmed email nurture sequence for new subscribers or first-time bookers
Lead-magnet nurture — free 20-min reading page likely has no follow-up conversion email sequence
Trial/consult conversion — no visible automated follow-up after a free or discounted first session to upsell a paid session
Booking reminders & no-show recovery — no public evidence of automated pre-session reminders or no-show re-engagement
Value newsletter — rich daily horoscope content on-site is not packaged into a regular email digest
Renewal / re-booking prompts — no evidence of 'time for your next reading' or anniversary triggers
Win-back / re-engagement — no visible campaign for clients who haven't booked in 60–90+ days
Referral / advocacy — no confirmed referral incentive for the brand's loyal repeat client base
toneVoice: Warm, mystical, and intimately personal; authoritative yet accessible; leans into spiritual identity with celebrity-credibility signals ('third-generation psychic to the stars'); conversational and encouraging rather than formal or clinical
compliance: Standard entertainment/spiritual services disclaimer required on all email; CAN-SPAM compliance for email and TCPA/10DLC compliance for SMS (active VIP text list); no HIPAA, financial, or legal-sector constraints
